title: GlycoReactionRecord
description: Structured record for a single glycosylation reaction extracted from a scientific paper.

paper_id.description: Unique ID of the source paper.

figure_id.description: ID of the figure/scheme from which the reaction was extracted.

donor_id.description: Alphanumeric identifier of the glycosyl donor (e.g. '3a').

donor_name.description: Chemical name or SMILES of the donor, if resolved.

acceptor_id.description: Alphanumeric identifier of the glycosyl acceptor.

acceptor_name.description: Chemical name or SMILES of the acceptor, if resolved.

product_id.description: Alphanumeric identifier of the glycosylation product.

product_name.description: Chemical name or SMILES of the product, if resolved.

promoter.description: Promoter reagent used (e.g. 'NIS/TfOH'). NR = not reported.

time.description: Reaction time (e.g. '2 h'). NR = not reported.

glycan_or_substrate_notes.description: Free-text notes about the glycan type or substrate.

procedure_reference.description: Reference to the experimental procedure (e.g. 'Procedure B', 'see SI Section 3').

supporting_chunks.description: Text chunks used to populate or verify fields.

provenance.description: Maps each field name to the source chunk/location it was extracted from.

completeness_score.description: Fraction of non-NR fields out of all tracked fields.

unresolved_fields.description: List of field names that remain NR after all filling steps.
